name: Tapenade-Molto Mario
recipeIngredient: 6 anchovy fillets, soaked in milk overnight and patted dry
1 cup pitted olives (Gaeta, Calamata or black)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend all ingredients until a smooth, homogenous paste is formed (about 2 minutes).
2. Tapenade may be refrigerated several weeks, well wrapped.
Yield: 2 cups
